description:
Navigate to https://silfratech.in/miraq/v4/.
a. It will first ask for the name, give it as Harshith S.
b. Later it will ask for email, give silfra.harshith@gmail.com.
c. Then it will ask for otp give it as 123456, and submit and wait for response and then do next step.

description:
Navigate to https://silfratech.in/miraq/v4/.
a. It will first ask for the name, give it as Harshith S.
b. Later it will ask for email, give silfra.harshith@gmail.com.
c. Then it will ask for otp give it as 123456, and submit and wait for response and then do next step.
d. Confirm the widget shows successful verification or login-complete style confirmation text.
e. After verification, perform the post-login navigation: use the in-widget back action to move out of the current conversation panel.
f. Then click the folder icon (Documents) in the bottom widget toolbar, next to the chat icon, and open Documents.
g. Wait until the file list is visible, then click Validate Content for the first file only.
h. Click on the widget icon located in the bottom right corner of the page.
i. Click on the chat icon within the widget.
j. Use the in-widget back action to navigate to the main menu.
k. Click on the Documents (folder) icon located in the bottom toolbar.
l. Wait for the file list to load.
m. Click on the 'Validate Content' button for the first file in the list.
n. Wait for the validation process to complete and verify that a success message is displayed.
o. Mark this complete case success only if all the steps are completed and passed.
expected_result: The document validation process completes successfully, and a success message is displayed after validating the content of the first file.

description:
Navigate to https://silfratech.in/miraq/v4/.
a. It will first ask for the name, give it as Harshith S.
b. Later it will ask for email, give silfra.harshith@gmail.com.
c. Then it will ask for otp give it as 123456, and submit and wait for response and then do next step.
d. Confirm the widget shows successful verification or login-complete style confirmation text.
e. Then click the folder icon (Documents) in the bottom widget toolbar, next to the chat icon, and open Documents.

expected_result: The IntentClassifier responds accurately to the question 'Who are you?' with an appropriate reply, confirming its functionality.
